parsed.production_notes: The video is a fully 2D animated advertisement utilizing flat vector graphics and motion design. It features stylized, non-photorealistic character designs and simple, smooth animations typical of digital app promotions.

characters.appearance: Young woman with light skin and freckles. She has a distinctive green bob haircut and simple facial features.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid purple long-sleeve shirt throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man with dark skin, black hair, and a prominent, thick black mustache. He has a sturdy build.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a pink button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up, green pants, and a brown belt.

characters.appearance: A stylized green owl with a rounded body, large expressive eyes, and an orange beak and feet.
Young man with light skin, orange hair, glasses, and a small orange mustache.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a simple green shirt.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene features a minimalist, flat-vector illustration style on a light background. A bright green owl character is visible, holding a black chess knight piece in its wing. The owl has large, expressive eyes and an orange beak. Later, a man with a thick black mustache, dark hair, and a pink shirt appears. He has a stern expression. The background remains a simple, solid light color throughout. The characters are composed centrally, with simple, smooth animations.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens with a mobile app interface showing a list of courses, highlighting a new chess option with the green owl mascot. It then transitions to a chess puzzle interface where the man with the mustache appears as a teacher. The visuals are clean, utilizing flat colors and simple shapes typical of modern UI design. Text overlays provide context for the new feature. The overall composition is vertical, designed for a mobile screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Okay so... I found out Duolingo has chess now.
Character A says: It's for beginners and advanced players.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man with a thick black mustache, dark hair, and a pink shirt sits cross-legged on a light blue background. He has a stern, serious expression. He then stands up, placing one hand on his hip and making an 'okay' gesture with his other hand. His expression shifts to a confident, slightly smug look. Squiggly lines and spirals appear around him, emphasizing his chaotic energy. The lighting is flat and even, typical of 2D vector animation. The framing is a medium full shot, keeping the character centered.

scenes.visual_description: The scene focuses entirely on the character Oscar against a plain background. He is introduced sitting calmly before standing up to strike a confident pose. Animated squiggles and arrows appear around him to visually represent his 'chaos agent' persona. Text overlays introduce him and his role as the resident grandmaster. The animation is smooth and emphasizes his personality.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Oscar's the one who welcomes you.
Character A says: He's Duolingo's resident grandmaster
Character A says: aaand chaos agent...
scenes.on_screen_text:
Oscar's the one who welcomes you.
Greetings. I am Oscar, Chess Grandmaster.

aaand chaos agent...

scenes.setting: Abstract light background and checkered surface

panels.panel_visual_description: A green owl character with large eyes and an orange beak appears on a light background. Following this, a man with a thick black mustache and pink shirt is seen. He then transitions to lying on his side on a checkered surface, propping his head up with one hand. He wears green pants and has a relaxed, almost mocking posture. The background is a solid light blue. The animation style is flat and colorful, with no complex shading. The framing focuses on the characters in the center of the screen.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows app interfaces where the owl asks about the user's chess experience. It then shows a simple chess puzzle with Oscar providing a hint. Finally, it cuts to Oscar lying provocatively on a chessboard, delivering a roasting comment. The visuals mix UI elements with character animations. Text overlays and speech bubbles drive the narrative forward.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: He analyzes your skills and places you into the perfect level.
Character A says: He starts off gentle.
Character A says: But soon the roasts begin.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman with a green bob haircut, freckles, and a purple long-sleeve shirt appears against a light blue background. She has a confident, slightly mischievous smile. A dark, rectangular card featuring a purple, horned, angry face illustration slides up behind her. Green star shapes float around her head. Her expression remains smug and self-assured. The composition is a medium close-up, focusing on her face and upper torso. The lighting is flat, and the colors are vibrant and contrasting.

scenes.visual_description: The narrator character is shown on screen for the first time. She looks smug as a tarot-style card representing the Scorpio zodiac sign appears behind her. The scene uses simple animations like floating stars to emphasize her confident and chaotic nature. Captions at the bottom mirror her spoken words. The focus is entirely on her character design and expression.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Little does he know...
Character A says: I'm a Scorpio.
Character A says: We thrive in chaos.
scenes.on_screen_text:

I'm a Scorpio.

panels.panel_visual_description: A green owl character flies upwards with its wings spread and a joyful expression. Next, the woman with green hair and a purple shirt is shown alongside a man with orange hair, glasses, and a green shirt. The man looks nervous and sweaty. They are positioned side-by-side. Finally, a checkered surface with various black and white pieces is shown. The woman's face appears at the bottom of the screen. The background is a consistent light blue, and the animation remains in a flat, 2D vector style.

scenes.visual_description: The scene begins with the owl celebrating an ELO rating increase. It then shows a matchmaking screen pitting the confident narrator against a nervous opponent named Tyler. The final shot is a top-down view of a chessboard interface with the narrator's avatar at the bottom. UI elements like buttons and timers are prominent throughout. The visual progression illustrates the user journey from rating gain to a live match.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Match by match, your ELO rating will rise.
Character A says: And when you're ready,
Character A says: he'll find you your perfect rival for a PvP match.

panels.panel_visual_description: The man with the mustache and pink shirt is seen standing and gesturing. Then, the woman with green hair and a purple shirt appears centrally against a light blue background. She looks side to side with a sly, confident expression. Several colorful, rectangular flags with different designs pop up and float around her head. A green star shape also appears. The framing is a medium close-up on the woman. The lighting is flat, and the overall color palette is pastel with bright accents.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with an app interface showing a switch from the chess course to a Spanish course, with Oscar visible on the path. It then cuts back to the narrator character, who looks smug as various national flags pop up around her. This illustrates her desire to trash talk in multiple languages. The transition between the app UI and the character shot is seamless. Captions continue to display her dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Now on days when I need a break from destroying my opponents,
Character A says: I hop over to learning Spanish.
Character A says: Because if I'm gonna talk trash...
Character A says: might as well do it multilingually.

panels.panel_visual_description: A green owl character blows a party horn, surrounded by falling colorful confetti. The woman with green hair and a purple shirt then appears, looking upwards with a slightly confused expression as green spirals float above her. The man with the mustache and pink shirt suddenly drops down from above, landing next to her with an angry, challenging expression and a raised fist. The woman smiles confidently. The background is light blue. The scene ends with a close-up of the green owl's face. The animation is lively and energetic.

scenes.visual_description: The final scene features the owl celebrating with confetti. It then shows the narrator looking up as Oscar drops in beside her, looking ready for a fight. The narrator smiles confidently, accepting the challenge. The video concludes with the Duolingo app icon and logo. Text overlays provide a final call to action for the viewers.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Anyways, I'm officially obsessed.
Character A says: If you think you can beat me,
Character A says: or Oscar,
Character A says: you know where to find us.
